home.heroSubtitle: From choosing to mastering AI tools — all in one place. Handpicked {toolCount} top AI tools with in-depth comparisons and detailed tutorials.
home.introTitle: Too Many AI Tools, Too Little Clarity
home.introBody: Hundreds of new AI tools launch every day. Need to make a video? Write code? Design an image? Each task has dozens of options, all claiming to be the best. Which one actually fits your workflow? How do you combine them effectively? That's where we come in — cut through the noise and get straight to what works.
